title: Glossary Bibliographic Resource
description: Represents a bibo:Document (or subclass) — a bibliographic resource as defined by the Bibliographic Ontology (BIBO, http://purl.org/ontology/bibo/). All properties are derived from BIBO, Dublin Core Terms, FOAF, and PRISM where specified. Expressed as a JSON-LD-ready document.

@context.description: JSON-LD context URI. Must reference the canonical context document for this schema.

@id.description: The globally unique IRI identifying this bibliographic resource as an RDF subject. Should be a DOI URI (https://doi.org/…) when available, otherwise a stable canonical URL or a local IRI.

@type.description: RDF type(s) drawn from the BIBO class hierarchy. Must be a subclass of bibo:Document. Multiple types may be combined (e.g. ['bibo:Article', 'bibo:AcademicArticle']). See $defs/biboTypes for the full enumeration.

title.description: dcterms:title — The full, official title of the bibliographic resource.

subtitle.description: bibo:shortTitle / dcterms:alternative — Subtitle or alternative title of the resource.

abstract.description: bibo:abstract — A summary of the resource. Maps to bibo:abstract (and schema:abstract).

authorList.description: bibo:authorList — Ordered list of authors as foaf:Agent nodes. Order is significant and preserved via JSON-LD @list. Use this instead of (or in addition to) 'creator' when authorship order must be recorded.

editorList.description: bibo:editorList — Ordered list of editors as foaf:Agent nodes. Relevant for edited volumes, proceedings, etc.

publisher.description: dcterms:publisher — The entity responsible for making the resource available (publisher, issuing body, conference organisation, etc.).

date.description: dcterms:date — Date of publication. Prefer ISO 8601 formats: full date (YYYY-MM-DD), year-month (YYYY-MM), or year only (YYYY).

issued.description: dcterms:issued — Date of formal issuance or publication. More specific than dcterms:date; preferred for standards and RFCs.

modified.description: dcterms:modified — Date of last significant revision of the resource itself.

identifier.description: dcterms:identifier — Generic identifier (e.g. local call number, arxiv ID). Prefer the typed identifiers (doi, isbn13, issn, etc.) whenever possible.

doi.description: bibo:doi — Digital Object Identifier, without the 'doi:' prefix (e.g. '10.1000/xyz123'). The canonical IRI form (https://doi.org/…) should be used as @id when possible.

uri.description: bibo:uri — Canonical URI of the resource.

url.description: schema:url — A URL where the resource or a representation of it can be accessed. Less stable than bibo:uri or doi.

isbn10.description: bibo:isbn10 — 10-digit ISBN identifier (digits and optional hyphens).

isbn13.description: bibo:isbn13 — 13-digit ISBN identifier (digits and optional hyphens, must start with 978 or 979).

issn.description: bibo:issn — ISSN of the journal, series, or periodical in which the resource was published.

eissn.description: bibo:eissn — Electronic ISSN of the publication venue.

number.description: bibo:number — Generic document or technical report number (e.g. RFC 9110, W3C REC, NIST SP 800-53).

volume.description: bibo:volume — Volume number of the journal or multi-volume work.

issue.description: bibo:issue — Issue number of the journal.

pageStart.description: bibo:pageStart — Starting page of the article within a journal, proceedings, or collection.

pageEnd.description: bibo:pageEnd — Ending page of the article within a journal, proceedings, or collection.

numPages.description: bibo:numPages — Total number of pages in the resource.

chapter.description: bibo:chapter — Chapter number, if the resource is a chapter within a book.

section.description: bibo:section — Section identifier within the resource.

isPartOf.description: dcterms:isPartOf — The containing resource (e.g. the journal, proceedings, or book in which this article appears). Expressed as a URI or an inline bibo:Document object.

hasPart.description: dcterms:hasPart — Components of this resource (e.g. chapters, sections, supplementary materials).

cites.description: bibo:cites — Resources that are cited by this resource.

citedBy.description: Inverse of bibo:cites — Resources that cite this resource (denormalised, for convenience).

subject.description: dcterms:subject — The topic of the resource, expressed as IRIs (e.g. skos:Concept IRIs) or plain-text keywords.

oneOf.description: IRI of a concept (e.g. a skos:Concept).

language.description: dcterms:language — BCP 47 language tag(s) of the resource (e.g. 'en', 'fr', 'en-US').

rights.description: dcterms:rights — A statement about rights held over the resource.

license.description: dcterms:license — IRI of the license under which the resource is distributed (e.g. 'https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/').

status.description: bibo:status — Publication or editorial status of the resource. Expressed as a CURIE from the BIBO status vocabulary or a plain string.

entryCreated.description: dcterms:created — ISO 8601 date on which this glossary entry was first created.

entryModified.description: dcterms:modified — ISO 8601 date on which this glossary entry was last modified.

entryCreator.description: dcterms:creator — Agent(s) who originally created this glossary entry.

entryContributor.description: dcterms:contributor — Agent(s) who contributed to this glossary entry after its initial creation.

biboType.description: A BIBO document class CURIE. All are subclasses of bibo:Document.

langStringMap.description: A map of BCP 47 language tag to a natural-language string value.

agent.description: A foaf:Agent — a person, organisation, or software agent.

@id.description: foaf:Agent IRI (e.g. ORCID https://orcid.org/0000-0000-0000-0000, WebID, or GitHub profile URI).

name.description: foaf:name — Full name or display name.

orcid.description: ORCID URI. Should match @id when the agent is identified by ORCID.

documentRef.description: A reference to another bibo:Document, as a URI or an inline stub object.
